svg.title: The Empress — Major Arcana III
svg.desc: Mystic Cartography tarot illustration of The Empress: a seated crowned female figure on a carved throne, rendered in fine gold linework engraving on deep navy. Twelve-star crown, scepter, Venus shield, pomegranate-motif robe, wheat sheaf and crescent moon at her feet, cypress grove archway and constellation behind her. Latin inscription above, title inscription below.
